nodes.label: Qlib Model Trainer  This module provides functionality to train Qlib models usin

Initialize the trainer.                  Args:             model_dir: Directory
Start a training task.                  Args:             config: Training confi
Execute training in background thread.                  Args:             task_i
Get training task status.                  Args:             task_id: Task ident
Cancel a training task.                  Note: This only marks the task as cance
Generate unique task ID from config.
Calculate Spearman Rank IC between predictions and labels.          Args:
Calculate ICIR (mean IC / std IC over time periods).          Computes Spearman
Calculate long-short return from quintile groups.          Groups stocks by pred
Save trained model to disk.                  Args:             model: Trained mo
